package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// scenario for dynamodb_scan_in_handler: `dynamodb.Scan` in request handler functions
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario407Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	_ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	return http.Get(url)
}
